# release-excludes.txt — rsync exclude list shared by release-zip.yml (builds
# the FTP release ZIP) and deploy-smoke.yml (verifies the same file set boots).
# Keep the two workflows in sync by editing only this file.
.git
.github
.claude
tests
dist
tmp/sess_*
temp
cache
node_modules
cypress
.cypress-cache
cypress.config.js
public/cypress_seed.php
package.json
package-lock.json
composer.json
Dockerfile
docker-compose.yml
docker-php-dev.ini
docker-compose.override.yml
nginx.conf
.dockerignore
phpcs.phar
phpcbf.phar
phpcs.xml
phpunit.xml
.phpunit.result.cache
.gitignore
.gitattributes
scripts
CLAUDE.md
CLA.md
CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
CONTRIBUTING.md
SECURITY.md
config/*.example
includes/.secret_salt
storage/files/*
